summary_en: Ｇ－コマースワン authorized a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: Ｇ－コマースワンが自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。

summary_en: Ｇ－コマースワン announced a material dividend change (special dividend). Reframes the return-of-capital baseline.
